modules.sql: SELECT s.security_id, COALESCE(s.ticker, '') AS ticker, COALESCE(s.security_name, '') AS security_name, COALESCE(s.sector, '') AS sector, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(h.current_value), 0), 2) AS total_held_value, COUNT(h.current_value) AS holder_count, MAX(s.as_of) AS as_of FROM securities s LEFT JOIN holdings h ON s.security_id = h.security_id WHERE s.security_type = 'Bond' GROUP BY s.security_id, s.ticker, s.security_name, s.sector ORDER BY s.security_id
